products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Recommended by Altroconsumo in their best capsule list
Wide range of flavors compatible with Dolce Gusto machines
Good balance of quality and price

products.name: Nespresso
pros: Recommended by Altroconsumo in their best capsule list
Consistent espresso quality compatible with Nespresso machines
Offers price points from €0.25 per shot

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review lists Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top capsule brands, citing quality, price and machine compatibility.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
